OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S CAMPOS LUIS AND CAMPOS JOANNE, IN THE SUM OF $350 FOR EACH PLTF; WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE.
